mcpConsoleDesc: Smart Core is bound to major editor instances, supporting browser-level local Skills and Model Context Protocol, parsing and executing conversational commands:
headlineOptDesc: Draft 5 high-CTR alternative headlines based on body copy
blockInjectDesc: Inject beautiful quotes, highlights, and author credit cards into the editor
qualityDiagnosticDesc: Smart character count, compliance check, and formatting check
formatLayoutDesc: One-click reformat and switch style into classic green, tech blue, etc.
typographyDesc: Select formatting stylesheets to enhance layout, with fine-tuned color matching and optmized letter-spacing & line-height.
themeColorsDesc: Select high-fidelity primary highlights adapted for standard reader resolutions
wechatBrandDesc: Official master class style, with strict borders and gold-ratio vertical negative spaces.
minimalistDesc: Aesthetic of ample void, low color saturation, focusing pure focus on photography and imagery.
techDesc: Tailored for science and software updates, containing mock pseudo-terminal margins and high-contrast codeblocks.
defaultArticleTitle: Silent Ripples: Science of WeChat Aesthetic Layout
quickInsert: In the middle insert quote: "Technology is first productivity, reshaping our cosmic imagination."
